thesis: Runtime libraries are not migration. A surface becomes migrated only after its authority, owner, fallback, evidence and rollback path are declared here.
rules: migrate one runtime surface at a time
do not mark a surface migrated because a dependency is installed
do not create a feature-local store outside the runtime-store contract
do not add new custom window events without a runtime-kernel event or command
do not move graph to React Flow until object and search authority are stable
browser evidence is required before migrated=true

overlay.nextCutover: Book Drawer enters overlay registry and focus/escape contract before visual restyling
overlay.rollback: keep legacy drawer and shell custom events until one overlay owner is verified

bookDrawer.currentOwner: BookDrawerReader React island + homepage inline drawer runtime
bookDrawer.nextCutover: migrate Book Drawer shell first; keep Reader runtime and MySQL memory authority unchanged
bookDrawer.rollback: feature flag returns book drawer open events to current BookDrawerReader shell

command.currentOwner: HomeCommandPalette cmdk island with inline search bridge
currentEvidence: runtime:command search.open is emitted before legacy home-search-open
command.nextCutover: move command open state and selected command action into commandStore
command.rollback: keep ready marker and legacy search bridge until commandStore is verified

store.currentOwner: local component state + inline vars + localStorage
store.nextCutover: overlayStore first, then commandStore; reader memory remains MySQL runtime truth
store.rollback: stores remain projection state only and can be bypassed by existing owners

blockedBy: drawer navigation intents must be typed
graph.rollback: keep existing /knowledge/ projection until React Flow route has browser evidence

motion.targetOwner: Runtime Experience Layer object continuity contract
motion.nextCutover: Book Card -> Drawer -> Reader continuity after overlay owner is stable
motion.rollback: motion remains decorative tokens until authority cutover is done
